content: Once the restoring process is over, you'll be automatically redirected to your {{productName}}.

comment.text: The PreparationPortalDescription translation key is used to display a message that will be shown after the restoring process is complete, informing users that they will be automatically redirected to their product name. This text appears in the UI on a screen where a progress indicator and percentage are displayed, likely on a preparation portal page.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation is missing the preposition 'to' (tai 'kohti') before the variable, making the sentence grammatically incomplete in Finnish ('...siirretään automaattisesti {{productName}}' instead of '...siirretään automaattisesti {{productName}}-palveluun/sivulle').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kun palautusprosessi on päättynyt, sinut ohjataan automaattisesti {{productName}}-palveluun.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation contains a redundant and nonsensical phrase '포털로 자동으로 {{productName}}로'. It translates to 'automatically to the portal to {{productName}}', which is grammatically broken and adds an extra destination ('portal') not present in the source.

The Latvian translation is grammatically incorrect in a way that changes the subject of the sentence. 'jūs automātiski pārsūtīs' implies 'you will redirect [someone else]', whereas the English 'you'll be automatically redirected' is passive. It should be 'jūs tiksiet automātiski pārsūtīts'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kad atjaunošanas process būs pabeigts, jūs tiksiet automātiski pārsūtīts uz savu {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation is missing the subject 'you' (zostaniesz), making the sentence grammatically incomplete or implying a passive voice that lacks the intended recipient in a way that feels unnatural in this context, though the primary issue is the missing reflexive/personal aspect of 'you will be redirected'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Po zakończeniu procesu przywracania zostaniesz automatycznie przekierowany do {{productName}}.
